key_findings: developer.dji.com 缺少 7 项关键安全头 (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options 等)
store-api.dji.com 的 /logger/beacon.gif 端点接受所有 HTTP 方法且无需认证
terra-1-g.djicdn.com (AliyunOSS) 存在通配符 CORS 配置 (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
account.dji.com OAuth authorize 端点无需 state 参数 (CSRF 风险)
OAuth token 端点使用 Basic HTTP Auth 认证 (realm=oauth2/client)
所有 document/{uuid} 路径返回 SPA fallback，未确认 IDOR
devcn.djicdn.com 和 developer.dji.com 均使用 Tengine 但未启用安全头

hf1_tech_fingerprint.summary: Technology stack identification with CVE cross-reference

components.note: Alibaba's Nginx fork on developer.dji.com, store-api.dji.com, account.dji.com, devcn.djicdn.com

cve_check.note: Apache Tengine dos vulnerability - cannot confirm without version
Kong Gateway bypass - if Kong version < 3.6.0

components.detection: Angular detected from framework patterns in main bundle; also React and Vue libs present

components.note: JS bundle structure shows webpack build system

cve_check.note: Bucket policy: AccessDenied for listing, files at specific paths accessible

components.detection: Via X-Kong-Upstream-Latency and X-Kong-Proxy-Latency headers on account.dji.com

cve_check.note: Kong Admin API port scanning needed: 8001/8443/8444

components.detection: acw_tc cookies set on all responses
components.note: Alibaba Cloud Web Application Firewall active on all subdomains
Used in Angular SPA for API communication

hf1_tech_fingerprint.infrastructure_diagram:
User Browser
    │
    ├── AWS CloudFront / Alibaba Tengine (developer.dji.com)
    │       │
    │       └── Angular SPA (client-side rendered)
    │               ├── auth → account.dji.com (Kong → Tengine)
    │               └── assets → devcn.djicdn.com (Tengine + OSS)
    │
    ├── Alibaba Cloud WAF (acw_tc cookie on all requests)
    │
    ├── store-api.dji.com (Tengine)
    │       └── /logger/beacon.gif (telemetry)
    │
    ├── terra-1-g.djicdn.com (AliyunOSS)
    │       └── SDK docs, firmware, assets
    │
    └── statistical-report.djiservice.org (DJI analytics)

hf2_js_extraction.summary: 8 JavaScript bundles downloaded and analyzed from devcn.djicdn.com

js_bundles.name: 7f7d741d7a8cb943fba3.js
js_bundles.purpose: Main app bundle (routes, API calls, business logic)

hf3_api_scanning.summary: 15 known endpoint paths tested across 3 domains

step1_unauthenticated_access.note: Telemetry endpoint, but accepts all HTTP methods
All UUIDs return 200 but is SPA rendering

step2_auth_bypass.note: No JWT token endpoints exposed on scanned surfaces
X-Original-URL, X-Rewrite-URL, X-Forwarded-For not tested against non-existent API routes

step3_horizontal_privilege_escalation.note: All document paths return SPA fallback 200; need authenticated session to test real IDOR

step4_vertical_privilege_escalation.note: No admin endpoints discovered in JS bundles

findings.description: account.dji.com OAuth authorize endpoint does not require/validate state parameter
findings.poc: 访问 /oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=dji_sdk&redirect_uri=https://developer.dji.com 直接重定向到登录页面，state 参数未被验证
findings.impact: 攻击者可构造恶意 OAuth URL 诱导用户完成登录后劫持授权码

findings.description: OAuth authorize endpoint passes redirect_uri through to login page without validation
findings.poc: /oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=test&redirect_uri=https://evil.com 仍返回 302 重定向到 login page，redirect_uri 参数透传
findings.impact: 登录完成后可能被重定向到攻击者控制的站点

findings.description: store-api.dji.com/logger/beacon.gif accepts all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, OPTIONS, HEAD) without auth
findings.poc: 任何来源的任意 HTTP 方法请求均返回 204
findings.impact: 可作为 CORS 探测点或 DDOS 放大，虽本身无害但暴露后端架构信息

findings.description: OAuth endpoint returns identical 302 redirect for all client_ids (valid and invalid)
findings.impact: Good practice - no client_id enumeration possible

hf6_infrastructure_exposure.summary: Infrastructure and object storage exposure assessment

domains.risk: HIGH - 全部 7 个关键安全头缺失
HIGH - 全部 7 个关键安全头缺失
LOW - 基本安全配置完善
MEDIUM - 通配符 CORS 配置 (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *)
domains.note: Bucket listing 被禁止 (403 AccessDenied)，但文件可按路径访问

domains.risk: HIGH - 全部安全头缺失，作为 JS 分发 CDN
MEDIUM - CORS 允许特定来源带凭证

hf7_realtime_protocol.detail: JS bundle analysis did not reveal any WebSocket (ws://, wss://), MQTT, STUN/TURN, or custom signaling protocol endpoints in the developer.dji.com frontend code.
hf7_realtime_protocol.note: This is expected for a documentation/portal website. Real-time protocols (DJI Pilot SDK channels, FlightHub WebSocket) would be in separate SDK binary downloads, not in web JS bundles.

security_issues_consolidated.description: 主站点完全缺失 HSTS、CSP、X-Frame-Options、X-Content-Type-Options、X-XSS-Protection、Referrer-Policy、Permissions-Policy 共 7 项关键安全头
security_issues_consolidated.impact: 增加点击劫持、MIME 嗅探、XSS、中间人攻击风险
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 添加 Strict-Transport-Security (max-age=31536000), Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

security_issues_consolidated.description: OAuth authorization endpoint does not require the 'state' parameter for CSRF protection
security_issues_consolidated.impact: 攻击者可构造恶意 OAuth 授权 URL，诱导已登录用户点击后完成授权码劫持，实现账户接管
security_issues_consolidated.poc: curl -v 'https://account.dji.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=dji_sdk&redirect_uri=https://developer.dji.com' 返回 302 无 state 校验
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 强制验证 state 参数为不可预测的随机值

security_issues_consolidated.description: 后端 API 完全缺失 7 项关键安全头
security_issues_consolidated.impact: API 端点易受各类 Web 攻击

security_issues_consolidated.description: JS 分发 CDN 完全缺失安全头
security_issues_consolidated.impact: 作为主站 JS 资产分发点，安全头缺失增加供应链攻击风险
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 添加安全响应头至 CDN 配置

security_issues_consolidated.impact: 任何网站可跨域读取 OSS 中的资源
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 将 CORS 配置为仅允许受信任的来源

security_issues_consolidated.type: Beacon Endpoint Accepts All HTTP Methods
security_issues_consolidated.description: Telemetry beacon 端点接受所有 HTTP 方法且无需认证
security_issues_consolidated.impact: 无实际数据泄露风险，但可作为攻击面探测点
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 限制仅接受 POST 或 GET，添加速率限制

security_issues_consolidated.description: Access-Control-Allow-Origin 设置为 store.dji.com 且允许凭据
security_issues_consolidated.impact: store.dji.com 若被 XSS，可读取 www.dji.com 的认证 cookie
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 验证 store.dji.com 的安全性，考虑移除 Allow-Credentials

security_issues_consolidated.description: OAuth 端点对所有 client_id（含无效）返回相同的 302 重定向，redirect_uri 参数被透传至 login/oauth 页面
security_issues_consolidated.impact: 潜在开放重定向风险 - 登录完成后 redirect_uri 可能未经验证
security_issues_consolidated.remediation: 登录完成后验证 redirect_uri 是否在白名单内

entry_points.chain: XSS on developer.dji.com → steal session → account takeover
Craft OAuth URL → victim clicks → code sent to attacker → exchange for token → account takeover
Malicious website → fetch OSS resources → read confidential SDK documentation/firmware
Probe beacon endpoint → discover other store-api endpoints → test for auth bypass

high_impact_chains.name: OAuth Login Hijacking (Critical Impact)
steps: 1. Attacker observes OAuth authorize flow accepts arbitrary redirect_uri
3. Victim (already logged into account.dji.com) clicks crafted link
4. OAuth flow completes → authorization code sent to attacker's redirect_uri
5. Attacker exchanges code for access token at /oauth/token
6. Attacker has full access to victim's DJI developer account
conditions: victim has active session on account.dji.com
high_impact_chains.mitigation: Add CSRF state validation, whitelist redirect_uris

high_impact_chains.name: Client-side Data Exfiltration via CDN
steps: 1. Attacker finds XSS on developer.dji.com (simplified by missing CSP)
2. Executes JS to extract API keys, tokens from page/localStorage
3. Exfiltrates data to attacker's server via CORS-enabled CDN (terra-1-g.djicdn.com)
4. Uses extracted credentials to access backend APIs
conditions: API keys/tokens stored in client-accessible locations
high_impact_chains.mitigation: Add strict CSP, audit client-side storage

recommendations.action: 立即在 account.dji.com 的 /oauth/authorize 端点实现 state 参数的强制验证，使用密码学安全的随机数作为 state 值
为 developer.dji.com 和 store-api.dji.com 添加完整 HTTP 安全响应头：HSTS、CSP、X-Frame-Options、X-Content-Type-Options、X-XSS-Protection、Referrer-Policy、Permissions-Policy
将 terra-1-g.djicdn.com 的 CORS 配置从通配符 * 改为仅允许受信任的来源，如 https://developer.dji.com
为 devcn.djicdn.com 添加安全响应头，特别是 CSP 和 X-Content-Type-Options
确保 OAuth 登录流程完成后验证 redirect_uri 在白名单内，防止开放重定向
对 /logger/beacon.gif 端点添加速率限制和 HTTP 方法白名单
移除 Tengine 和 Kong 网关的版本信息泄露

methodology_compliance.hf3_api_scanning: COMPLETE - 15 endpoints tested, fuzzing limited by SPA nature
methodology_compliance.hf4_auth_bypass: PARTIAL - 4-step sequence started, full bypass requires authenticated session
methodology_compliance.hf7_realtime_protocol: COMPLETE - No real-time protocols found (expected for portal site)
